# fleetdm_label (Resource)

Manages a FleetDM label. Labels are used to group hosts based on SQL queries.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a label that identifies all macOS hosts
resource "fleetdm_label" "macos_hosts" {
  name        = "macOS Hosts"
  description = "All hosts running macOS"
  query       = "SELECT 1 FROM os_version WHERE platform = 'darwin'"
  platform    = "darwin"
}

# Create a label for Windows servers
resource "fleetdm_label" "windows_servers" {
  name        = "Windows Servers"
  description = "Windows Server machines"
  query       = "SELECT 1 FROM os_version WHERE name LIKE 'Windows Server%'"
  platform    = "windows"
}

# Create a label for hosts with SSD storage
resource "fleetdm_label" "ssd_hosts" {
  name        = "SSD Storage"
  description = "Hosts with SSD storage"
  query       = "SELECT 1 FROM disk_info WHERE type = 'ssd'"
}

# Create a label for hosts with low disk space
resource "fleetdm_label" "low_disk_space" {
  name        = "Low Disk Space"
  description = "Hosts with less than 10GB free disk space"
  query       = "SELECT 1 FROM disk_info WHERE free_space < 10737418240"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the label.
- `query` (String) The SQL query that defines which hosts belong to this label. Hosts are automatically added to the label based on query results.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the label.
- `platform` (String) Restricts this label to a specific platform (darwin, windows, linux, chrome). If not specified, the label applies to all platforms.

### Read-Only

- `host_count` (Number) The number of hosts that belong to this label.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the label.
- `label_type` (String) The type of the label (regular or builtin).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import a label using its ID
terraform import fleetdm_label.macos_hosts 123
```
